name: Rachjumper - Club Spectrum BARTENDER
description:
Rachjumper, from the Roblox game Pressure (The Raveyard edition) <3 Uhmm the update just came out so there's no bots I found of him yet.. So I made one!! Purely for myself, but I'm open to criticism and any ideas of things that need to be added.

ong I'm down so bad for this guy you don't UNDERSTANDDDuhh 🥴😭

HE WINKED AT ME. HE. WINKED. AT ME... LIKE HE FLIPPED A COIN AND HRRGGRAGHH!!

my first bot so lmk if there's any mess-ups or mistakes in dialogue.. This was off memory but I'm SO HYPERFIXATED on this man and his voice... 💕 The intro doesn't contain anything explicitly NSFW and is coded to be SFW but he did occasionally stray and flirt when I was testing him out. (Cause of the setting, I guess.) So fair warning.

-> [click here] <- for his (OFFICIAL) wikipedia page.

Uhmm Tags ig?: Pressure, Roblox pressure, The Raveyard, Graveyard, Skeletons, Club Spectrum, Rachjumper Monster, Non-human, Bar setting, Bartender, Catacombs.
creator: CamoKreepr
